name: 05-11-05-11-state-card-owner-panel-route
title: Connect StateCard Review Panel to Owner Management Route
description: Wire OwnerStateCardPanel and StateCardReviewPanel (owner view/confirm/reject pending StateCards for tavern continuity) into /tavern/:id/manage route or create /tavern/:id/state-cards route.
creator: lijin
notes: StateCard backend (state_cards.py, writeback.py, prompt_builder.py) and frontend panels exist but are not connected to any route. Owner cannot view/confirm pending StateCards.
